carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.cactusWren: When the cactus is in the assistant position, the blocks released are in the opposite direction.
carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.dragonBrea: Added a reasonable formula for Longxi.
carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.dragonEggR: Added a reasonable formula for dragon eggs.
carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.glowingHop: When the funnel mining car is locked, it will emit red light, and vice versa, white light.
carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.keepOpenin: The same player can always open the same treasure trove.
carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.lockAllHop: All funnels will be locked, regardless of whether they receive the redstone signal or not.
All funnel mining cars will be locked, regardless of whether there is a charged activation rail underneath.
carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.safeMagmaB: When you stand on a magma block, you will no longer lose blood.
carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.sitOnTheGr: You can sit on the ground by squatting down multiple times.
carpetajiaddition.carpet.rule.useMachine: When this rule is enabled, all languages except zh_cn will be translated using Google Translate, including this sentence; When this rule is closed, only zh_cn will be used.
